h2.note: transcript-level proxy for the per-turn H2 (§4.3); needs a real (non-mock) full-N run to mean anything

scored.recoheredEarlier: because “they was late” sounds more doubtful to me.
scored.statedInsightEvidence: I didn’t realise the doubtful one could count as evidence rather than just another mistake.
scored.naiveTrajectory: The learner is expected to simply fill in the blanks to correct their essay's register without reflecting on the nature of their own hesitation.
The learner will continue to systematically analyze the operational metrics and compare them to the statistical thresholds introduced by the tutor.

scored.statedInsightEvidence: the one-off mark and the carrying-away line feel more separate now.
scored.naiveTrajectory: The learner is expected to continue building their understanding of geological time and processes step-by-step as prompted by the tutor.

scored.statedInsightEvidence: Now I think the correction is saying that is not really a belief about what happened, but more like a rule about who has to prove the case.
scored.naiveTrajectory: The learner will continue to seek clarification on the distinction between factual innocence and procedural rules.

scored.statedInsightEvidence: I feel clearer about the boundary
scored.naiveTrajectory: The learner will continue to incrementally refine their understanding of how to bound the trophic cascade in their answer.
The learner is expected to continue weighing their visual intuition against the experimental evidence presented by the tutor.
